nodes.name: Cron Trigger
nodes.notes: FAST: Trigger every 5 minutes, 24/7. Feed-agnostic architecture with standard output schema.

nodes.name: Loris API Feed
nodes.notes: FAST: Fetch funding rates from Loris Tools. No API key required. Response: funding_rates[exchange][symbol]

nodes.name: Normalize Funding Data
nodes.notes: FAST: Transform Loris API response to standard feed-agnostic schema. Values x10000 converted to decimal.

nodes.name: Signal Detection
nodes.notes: FAST: Detect funding rate signals based on thresholds. Triggers alerts for HIGH severity.

nodes.name: Format Summary
nodes.notes: FAST: Format human-readable summary for display and notifications

nodes.name: Store Latest
nodes.notes: FAST: Store latest funding rates snapshot

nodes.name: Store History
nodes.notes: FAST: Append to 12h history. Consider rotation in production.

nodes.name: Webhook: Snapshot
nodes.notes: FAST: Returns human-readable snapshot via GET /webhook/funding

nodes.name: Webhook: Raw JSON
nodes.notes: FAST: Returns normalized JSON data via GET /webhook/funding-raw

nodes.name: Webhook: Signals
nodes.notes: FAST: Returns detected signals via GET /webhook/funding-signals

nodes.name: Webhook: By Symbol
nodes.notes: FAST: Returns symbol-specific data via GET /webhook/funding-symbol

nodes.name: Send Alert Webhook
nodes.notes: FAST: POST alert to crypto-alert webhook if urgency is alta
